skill.name: tiktok-automation
skill.description: Automate TikTok tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): upload/publish videos, post photos, manage content, and view user profiles/stats. Always search tools first for current schemas.
skill.summary: Automate TikTok content creation and profile operations through Composio's TikTok toolkit via Rube MCP.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 56 static findings are false positives. The skill is documentation-only (SKILL.md) describing TikTok API usage via Rube MCP. Backtick patterns are markdown code delimiters, the URL is a legitimate MCP endpoint, and no cryptographic or reconnaissance code exists. No malicious intent detected.

content.value_statement: This skill enables automated video uploading, publishing, and content management on TikTok through Rube MCP, eliminating manual posting workflows.
actual_capabilities: Upload and publish videos to TikTok automatically
Post photo content to TikTok profiles
List and manage existing published videos
Retrieve user profile information and account statistics
Check content publish status and processing state
limitations: Requires active TikTok OAuth connection via Rube MCP
Cannot automate engagement actions (likes, comments, follows)
Content must meet TikTok format requirements (MP4/WebM, max 4GB)
Rate limited by TikTok API and platform guidelines

use_cases.title: Automated Video Publishing Pipeline
use_cases.description: Schedule and automatically upload video content to TikTok without manual intervention using the upload-publish workflow.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators managing bulk video publishing

use_cases.title: Social Media Management Dashboard
use_cases.description: View profile stats, track video performance, and manage content library through programmatic API access.

use_cases.title: Cross-Platform Content Distribution
use_cases.description: Integrate TikTok publishing into broader content automation workflows alongside other social platforms.

prompt_templates.title: Upload and Publish Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the tiktok-automation skill to upload a video file and publish it to TikTok with the title '{video_title}' and privacy level '{privacy_level}'.

prompt_templates.title: Check Account Statistics
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the tiktok-automation skill to get my TikTok profile information and account statistics including follower count and total videos.

prompt_templates.title: List Published Videos
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the tiktok-automation skill to list my last {count} published TikTok videos with their metadata including titles and share URLs.

prompt_templates.title: Monitor Publish Status
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the tiktok-automation skill to check the publish status of video with publish_id '{publish_id}' and report if it succeeded or failed.

output_examples.input: Upload and publish a promotional video
output_examples.output: Video uploaded successfully with publish_id: abc123xyz. Status: processing (45% complete). Once status shows 'ready', the video will be published with title 'New Product Launch' and privacy level PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE.
Profile: @username | Followers: 12500 | Following: 450 | Total Videos: 89 | Total Likes: 156000

Found 5 videos:
1. 'Summer Highlights 2024' - 12500 views - Posted 2024-07-15
2. 'Tutorial: Getting Started' - 8900 views - Posted 2024-07-12
3. 'Behind the Scenes' - 15200 views - Posted 2024-07-10

best_practices: Always verify Rube MCP connection status is ACTIVE before running TikTok operations
Poll publish status at 5-10 second intervals to avoid rate limiting
Use exponential backoff when receiving 429 (rate limit) responses
anti_patterns: Attempting to publish without checking upload processing status first
Not handling OAuth token expiration (401 responses)

faq.question: Do I need TikTok API keys to use this skill?
faq.answer: No API keys required. The skill uses Rube MCP which handles OAuth authentication with TikTok through the user's connected account.

faq.question: Can I upload videos longer than 10 minutes?
faq.answer: No. TikTok limits videos to maximum 10 minutes and 4GB file size. The skill will fail if you attempt to upload larger files.

faq.question: Why does video upload and publish require two separate steps?
faq.answer: TikTok's API requires uploading first, then publishing separately. You must wait for processing to complete (check via FETCH_PUBLISH_STATUS) before publishing.

faq.question: Can I view other users' profiles with this skill?
faq.answer: No. All profile and stats operations return data only for the authenticated connected TikTok account.

faq.question: What happens if my video fails content moderation?
faq.answer: The publish status will show failure with error details. TikTok's content moderation may cause delays or rejections after processing is complete.

faq.question: How do I handle rate limiting?
faq.answer: Implement exponential backoff on 429 responses. Poll at reasonable intervals (5-10 seconds) to avoid hitting rate limits proactively.
